title: LongTraceRL: Learning Long-Context Reasoning from Search Agent Trajectories with Rubric Rewards
one_sentence_judgment: 把长上下文 RL 的两个硬伤一起治:数据上用搜索 agent「读了却没引用」的真实行为造高混淆分级干扰物(可量化难度,含黄金实体比例与下游分严格同序),奖励上用推理链每跳的黄金实体做实体级 rubric 过程分、且只给答对的回答(positive-only)防 reward hacking;三模型五 benchmark 稳超基线(Qwen3-4B +5.7、AA-LCR +8.6,去 rubric 增益几乎全失),是 L1 自进化「从自身轨迹榨训练信号 + 防作弊进化奖励」的直接蓝本;但绝对增益随规模不均(8B 仅 +1.1)、rubric 本质是实体召回非推理正确、数据单一 Wikipedia 源且依赖所用 agent 能力,evidence_quality 偏弱。

auditors: claude-opus (orchestrator, independent of the opus author)
cold_audit.verdict: Cross-model PASS by both. Authored by an opus sub-agent; audited independently by Claude AND codex GPT-5.5. Round 1: codex HELD for missing 自报/实测 tagging + the '稳定超过强基线' overclaim. Revised: added an 自报-vs-实测 disclaimer marking all scores/ablations/configs (GPT-5.2, k=8, K=5, 32xH800) as 论文自报, and softened the claim to '平均分均居首,但绝对增益不均 (4B +5.7, 8B 仅 +1.1)'. Round 2: codex PASS + Claude PASS. Authorized by Kevin (deploy contingent on you+codex independent cross-model pass).
